rulings.Case Title: PENGRA VS HOLT
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE (1)WHETHER DEFECT WAS TRIVIAL, SEE PGS. 22-23 & 30 OF DOUTHIT DEPOSITION & 67 OF FEJES DEPOSITION; (2)WHETHER DEFENDANT COMPLETED HIS WORK, SEE PG. 66 OF FEJES DEPOSITION; AND (3)WHETHER DEFENDANT CEDED CONTROL BACK TO HOLT, SEE PG. 60 OF FEJES DEPOSITION. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: SHRAYBER VS. HOLIDAY HARBOR, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO WITHDRAW WILL BE GRANTED ON CONDITION TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED. COURT CONTINUES THIS MOTION TO JUNE 19, 2002 TO PERMIT HEARING ON MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: OAKLEY VS NORTHWEST AIRLINES INC
rulings.Rulings: COURT ORDERS ARBITRATION IN CALIFORNIA. COURT ORDERS THAT NEUTRAL ARBITRATOR IS TO BE SELECTED UTILIZING PROCEDURE SET FORTH IN CCP 1281.6 - COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION OF B&P 17200 CLAIM WHICH IS NOT SUBJECT TO ARBITRATION. (JH)
